appDesc: A Twitch extension that enhances chat interaction with custom commands, flexible moderation, and much more.
commandsDescription: Add your own commands to save time in the chat. Specify a trigger (for example, !hello) and the response text. The command will automatically be replaced with your message after it is sent or immediately after you press the spacebar.
moderationDescription: Add your own moderation rules to automatically manage the chat. Specify a trigger (such as words or phrases) and an action, and the extension will automatically execute them when a match is detected.
highlightDescription: Add rules to highlight messages in the chat. Specify a trigger or a username, and those messages will be automatically highlighted when the condition is met.
backupDescription: On this page, you can create a backup of your extension settings or import a previously saved file.
exportDescription: Save all current settings and data to a file for future restoration.
importModerationRuleFromGitHubDescriptio: Use the pre-built rule presets from the GitHub repository to quickly set up chat moderation.
importModerationRuleFromGitHubAlert: You are about to import a preset of moderation rules from a GitHub repository. Existing rules may be updated or supplemented. Continue?
importedRulesCount: {{count}} new rules have been successfully imported
importMergeDescription: Add data from a file to the current database. If records already exist, they will be updated with the latest values.
